feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Query to show abc curve items sold during a given period
entry.content:
Below is a query to show the ABC curve for items sold during a given period

I accept improvement suggestions

 

;WITH ResumoVendas AS (
	SELECT r."ItemCode" "Cod. Produto",
	r."U_RM_CodRef" "Cod. Ref" ,
	r."Dscription" "Descrição",
	sum(r."Quantity") "Qtde Pedido",
	sum(r."LineTotal") "Total Item"
	FROM RDR1 r 
	WHERE YEAR(r."DocDate") >='2024'
	GROUP BY r."ItemCode",r."U_RM_CodRef",r."Dscription" ),
PercFaturamento AS (
	SELECT 
	"Cod. Produto",
	"Cod. Ref",
	"Descrição",
	"Qtde Pedido",
	"Total Item",
	sum("Qtde Pedido") over() AS "Total Acumulado",
	"Qtde Pedido" / sum("Qtde Pedido") over() * 100 AS "Percentual"
	FROM ResumoVendas),
CurvaABC AS (
	SELECT 
	"Cod. Produto",
	"Cod. Ref",
	"Descrição",
	"Qtde Pedido",
	"Total Item",
	"Total Acumulado",
	"Percentual",
	sum("Percentual") over(ORDER BY "Qtde Pedido" DESC) AS "Percentual Acumulado"
	FROM PercFaturamento)
SELECT 
	"Cod. Produto",
	"Cod. Ref",
	"Descrição",
	"Qtde Pedido",
	"Total Item",
	CONCAT(ROUND("Percentual", 6), '%') AS "Percentual",
	CONCAT(ROUND("Percentual Acumulado", 6), '%') AS "Percentual Acumulado",
	CASE WHEN "Percentual Acumulado" <= 80 THEN 'A'
	WHEN "Percentual Acumulado" <= 95 then   'B'
	ELSE 'C'
	END AS "Curva"
	FROM CurvaABC

entry.title: ¿Cómo actualizar el campo ReportID de la tabla ECM2 sin timbrar el documento?
entry.content:
Como parte del proceso de implementación de una nueva sociedad que surge de la fusión de dos sociedades anteriores administradas con SAP Business One, voy a cargar las facturas de clientes registradas en estas sociedades.

Algunas de ellas pueden ser utilizadas en documentos subsecuentes, como en cobros y será necesario generar su Complemento de pago. Con el fin de usar el mismo .spp para generar el complemento, ¿Existe una forma de actualizar el campo de ReportID de la tabla ECM2? Ya revisé mediante DTW, pero solo es posible configurar los datos para el timbrado de la factura con la tabla ECM6.

¿Alguna recomendación para realizarlo?

Ya he creado un UDF para agregar el UUID a las facturas y hacer el remapeo del spp, pero estoy revisando opciones para usar los campos nativos.

entry.title: Problems with Patch in C# Console App - Don't Work - Error 500
entry.content:
Hello community, I hope you can help me, we are developing a console application with C#.

When we test via POSTMAN, everything works and updates the records, but when we do it via C# it doesn't work.

We share with you 2 approaches with which we test in C3 and both approaches fail.

Our code :

from this repo

https://github.com/adrian-scan4sap/code-queries-sl/blob/main/code-queries-sl/Program.cs

public static async Task TestPatch(){ 
ServicePointManager.SecurityProtocol = SecurityProtocolType.Tls;
                string baseUrl = "https://1.10.80.20:40000/b1s/v1/";
                ServicePointManager.ServerCertificateValidationCallback = (sender, cert, chain, sslPolicyErrors) => true;
                string businessPartnerUrl = $"{baseUrl}/BusinessPartners('USA140FGH82500')";

                // Create a JSON payload for the new Business Partner
                JObject businessPartnerData = new JObject
            {
                { "CardCode", "USA140FGH82500" }, // Provide a unique Business Partner code
                {
                    "ContactEmployees", new JArray
                    {
                        new JObject
                        {
                            { "Name", "Example Name 1..." },
                        }
                    }
                }
            };
                try
                {
                    HttpWebRequest request = (HttpWebRequest)WebRequest.Create(businessPartnerUrl);
                    request.Method = "PATCH";
                    request.ContentType = "application/json";
                    request.Accept = "application/json";
                    request.Headers.Add("Cookie", $"B1SESSION={'7545-8455-SA-TOKEN'}");
                    using (var streamWriter = new StreamWriter(request.GetRequestStream()))
                    {
                        streamWriter.Write(businessPartnerData.ToString());
                        streamWriter.Flush();
                        streamWriter.Close();
                    }
                    using (HttpWebResponse response = (HttpWebResponse)request.GetResponse())
                    {
                        if (response.StatusCode == HttpStatusCode.NoContent)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine("Business Partner Contact updated successfully.");
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine("Failed to update Business Partner Contact. Status code: " + response.StatusCode);
                        }
                    }
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while updating the Business Partner Contact: " + ex.Message);
                }

Result :  Error 500 !

 

please, can someone give us some help, some link, some repository, some code?

entry.title: SAP B1 Incoming payment Internal Error 229 is showing.
entry.content:
Dear All, 

Recently we are updated our SAP B1 from 9.3 to 10 with patch level 2405 after that when we are try to add the incoming payment suddenly internal error 229 is now showing. 

Kindly help me how to resolved this issue. 

Best regards, 

Debabrata Biswas

entry.title: Validation like committed qty not greather than available qty SAP Business one
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to develop validation into Inventory transfer request like Total committed quantity is not greeter then total available quantity from all the warehouse.  SAP is not allowed to create the inventory transfer request document if committed quantity from all warehouse is exceed from sum of available quantity.

All warehouse available quantity is 100.   SAP is not allowed to make 101 quantity inventory transfer request document. 

SAP Business One

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Filter Not Selected
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
We are facing issue in sorting.
In AP Invoice or any document where cost center is defined, we type the cost center then it searches for it. from the list when click on down arrow it reset and again search from alphabet "A". 
 
Please suggest on the same.
 
Regards,
Gazanfar Ali Shaikh

entry.title: How to query for last Bin Location that received Items?
entry.content:
We are using SAP Business One SQL 10.0

We have a warehouse set up with bin locations, and for auto allocation on receipt we are using LAST BIN LOCATION THAT RECEIVED ITEMS.

We want to create a report based on A/P Reserve Invoice lines to tell the warehouse personnel where was the items last received  (Bin Location).

I am a novice on SQL and i don´t know were this information is stored, and how to get the last Bin location that received items from that table.

entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to Details understanding into BoM and Production order with multiple types BoM examples and it's use into SAP Business One.

Bill Of Materials and Production Order

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Details understanding into Resource Module SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to Details understanding into Resource Module with examples and it's use into SAP Business One.

Resource Module , Bill Of Materials and Production Order

Nikunj

entry.title: How to set dynamic Key Value parameter in Call B1 Object atom
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I had a requirement to get the dynamic 'Key Value' of Call B1 Object atom every time the predecessor atom has been initiated by HTTP call. 

I'm using a HTTP Call Inbound Type from Inbound Channel. I need to get the CardCode value generated from atom below. 

<xsl:output method="xml" encoding="UTF-8" indent="yes"></xsl:output>
<xsl:param name="atom"></xsl:param>
<xsl:param name="sessionid"></xsl:param>
<xsl:variable name="msg" select="/vpf:Msg/vpf:Body/vpf:Payload[./@Role='S']"></xsl:variable>
<xsl:variable name="vpSender" select="/vpf:Msg/vpf:Header/vpf:Sender/@Id"></xsl:variable>
<xsl:variable name="vpObject" select="/vpf:Msg/vpf:Header/vpf:Sender/@ObjId"></xsl:variable>
<xsl:variable name="vpReceiver" select="/vpf:Msg/vpf:Header/vpf:ReceiverList/vpf:Receiver[./@handover='P']/@Id"></xsl:variable>
<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:variable name="vptsDoc" select="document('/com.sap.b1i.internal/xml/timestamp')"></xsl:variable>
<xsl:variable name="vpts" select="concat($vptsDoc/*/@year,'/',$vptsDoc/*/@month,'/',$vptsDoc/*/@date,' ',$vptsDoc/*/@hour,':',$vptsDoc/*/@minute,':',$vptsDoc/*/@second)"></xsl:variable>
<vpf:Msg>
<xsl:copy-of select="/vpf:Msg/@*"></xsl:copy-of>
<xsl:copy-of select="/vpf:Msg/vpf:Header"></xsl:copy-of>
<vpf:Body>
<xsl:copy-of select="/vpf:Msg/vpf:Body/*"></xsl:copy-of>
<vpf:Payload Role="X" id="{$atom}" ts="{$vpts}">
<xsl:call-template name="transform"></xsl:call-template>
</vpf:Payload>
</vpf:Body>
</vpf:Msg>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template name="transform">
<BusinessPartners>
<row>
<CardCode>
<xsl:value-of select="$msg/bfa:io/bfa:object/bfa:string[./@name='AccountCode']"></xsl:value-of>
</CardCode>
<CardName>
<xsl:value-of select="$msg/bfa:io/bfa:object/bfa:string[./@name='AccountName']"></xsl:value-of>
</CardName>
<PayTermsGrpCode>
<xsl:value-of select="$msg/bfa:io/bfa:object/bfa:string[./@name='PaymentTerms']"></xsl:value-of>
</PayTermsGrpCode>
<FederalTaxID>
<xsl:value-of select="$msg/bfa:io/bfa:object/bfa:string[./@name='TIN']"></xsl:value-of>
</FederalTaxID>
</row>
</BusinessPartners>

entry.title: DI API to create fixed asset master data SAP B1 Fields not localized and Distribution Rule Error
entry.content:
Friends
I am trying to import fixed assets through the DI-API, and I did not find the fields related to Capitalization (APC) ITM8, normal Accumulated Depreciation and Quantity of Assets in the Items object. Another problem that I encountered is related to the cost center, but specifically the distribution rule, when I try to update a record it generates an error related to [OCR1.PrcAmount] ITM6. I first tried to upload it through the Excel importer, but the fields related to the cost center are not there. 

I also tried using the Service Layer to update the cost center and the same error occurs

 

I appreciate any help

Eduardo Gama

entry.title: Document TAB Production Order SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to details understanding on Production Order Option from 

SAP Business One Main Menu, -> choose Administration ->  System Initialization -> Document Settings Per Document tab, and in the Document field, select Production Order.

In the Use for components transactions: Component WIP Accounts and Parent Item WIP Accounts. 

In the Posting Schemas for Manufacturing area, select the Accounting with Balance Sheet Accounts and Profit & Loss Accounts radio button.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: About the A/R Reserve Invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I am asking a question relevant to SAP Business One. Is the A/R Reserve Invoice available in the Indian localization? If it is available how can we setup. Thank You.

Malshi.

entry.title: DI API to create fixed asset master data SAP B1 Fields not localized
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am developing an application to import fixed assets, replacing the function of SAP Business One Administration->Data Import/Export->Data Import->Import Fixed Asset Master Data from Microsoft Excel. However, I am not identifying the fields below in the object SAPbobsCOM.Items.
- Remaining Life, APC, Accumulated Ordinary Depr. and Asset Quantity. If anyone has a model with these fields, I would appreciate it.Best regards,

Eduardo Gama

entry.title: SAP Unable to Preview and Save as PDF
entry.content:
Hi Expert

need help to resolved this issue on user account

note:  we created user on Windows Server and user is connecting via RDP on server.

          Other user account has no issue on pdf preview only this particular user

when we try to preview the PDF on SAP Client and it show this the below error 

"Could not find a part of the path 'C:\Users\user5\AppData\Local\Temp\24\B1CRPROXY_CONNSTR_0000E334_0.tmp'."
 
Thank you for your help
Zernan

entry.title: Generate Script is not working in SQL SAP Business One

When I am trying to backup via Generate script option then it is showing error as per below attachment. No error comes into entire script but at last it is showing message like Save to Clipboard - error.

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: SQL Database size suddenly increased SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Recently, There is daily basis SQL database size increased for one database. Log size file is also increased at a same time. 

How to check and reduce the log size file? 

SAP Business One , SQL 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: B1 Sap error -5002: 10000100 - Document total value must be zero or greater than zero
entry.content:
Hi, we are currently using Api with SAP Business One 10 to upload Returns to SAP.

We are using next querry but receiving Sap error -5002: 10000100 - Document total value must be zero or greater than zero:

<BOM>
<BO>
<AdmInfo>
<Object>16</Object>
</AdmInfo>
<ORDN>
<row>
<NumAtCard>FWIZ0000001</NumAtCard>
<DocDate>20240814</DocDate>
<DocDueDate>20240814</DocDueDate>
<CardCode>510000000</CardCode>
<CardName>Victory Supermarkets Ltd1</CardName>
<DocTotal>NULL</DocTotal>
<Address>Big St 29, Marseille, France</Address>
</row>
</ORDN>
<RPD1>
<row>
<LineNum>1</LineNum>
<ItemCode>4a1848dd-52f5-11ea-b82b-00505697fa93</ItemCode>
<Quantity>5</Quantity>
<Price>3</Price>
<unitMsr>pcs</unitMsr>
<AcctCode>70000000</AcctCode>
</row>
</RPD1>
</BO>
</BOM>

Any help will be highly welcomed.

entry.title: Attach database is not working SQL SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

When I am trying to upload the .mdf file using option ATTACH into SSMS but it is showing error as per attached snap.  I have taken a backup from same SQL server and same SQL SSMS and try to attach into same instance but it is showing error.  

Regards,

Nikunj
